hero_bio: Passionate about designing clean, efficient, and scalable solutions. Specialized in React, Python, Node.js, and Java.
projects_subtitle: A selection of web development and software projects I've built.
about_subtitle: Full Stack Developer with a Software Engineering degree.
about_text: I'm a Full Stack Web Developer trained in Software Engineering at the National University of Loja. With a solid command of Python, JavaScript (React/Node.js), and Java, I seek to apply my developer skills to create technology that adds value and solves complex problems. My experience in web development and software development projects has given me a solid foundation in agile methodologies, RESTful API design, and version control with Git.
skills_subtitle: Technologies and tools I work with as a web developer.
contact_text: I am currently open to new opportunities as a Full Stack Web Developer. If you have a project in mind or think I could be a good fit for your software development team, feel free to contact me.
